title: Relocate subagent-only skill templates into templates/skills and bundle them
description: Create the new `templates/skills/` source tree for subagent-only Codex skills, leave `memory` and `spec-management` in repo-root `.agents/skills/`, and update packaged asset helpers/package data so bundled subagent skill templates resolve from the new location.
acceptance_criteria: All subagent-only Codex skills previously authored under repo-root `.agents/skills/` are moved to `templates/skills/` with the same IDs and content shape.
Repo-root `.agents/skills/` retains only operator-facing exceptions, specifically `memory` and the existing `spec-management` skill in place.
Runtime asset helpers and package-data wiring expose the bundled subagent catalog from `templates/skills/` rather than the old `.agents/skills/` bundle root.
